category.scope_note: Electric vehicle charger and EV supply equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Bangladesh EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备进入孟加拉国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備進入孟加拉國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Bangladesh BSTI standards due diligence, IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 technical expectations, BPDB or utility grid-connection checks, 50 Hz operation, EV charging-guideline items, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电设备文件与孟加拉国BSTI标准尽调、IEC 61851/IEC 62196技术预期、BPDB或公用事业并网核查、50 Hz运行、充电指南事项以及中国GB/T 18487/GB/T 20234基线差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電設備文件與孟加拉國BSTI標準盡調、IEC 61851／IEC 62196技術預期、BPDB或公用事業併網核查、50 Hz運行、充電指南事項以及中國GB/T 18487／GB/T 20234基線差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BSTI conformity assessment, BPDB or distribution-utility connection approval, tariff approval, fire/building approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, designers, and installers should verify current Bangladesh BSTI, BPDB, BERC, distribution utility, fire, building, tax, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, installation, energisation, or operation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BSTI合格评定、BPDB或配电公用事业接入批准、电价批准、消防/建筑批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电运营商、设计方和安装方在出货、销售、安装、送电或运营前，应与合格专业人士核实现行孟加拉国BSTI、BPDB、BERC、配电公用事业、消防、建筑、税务及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BSTI合格評定、BPDB或配電公用事業接入批准、電價批准、消防／建築批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電營運商、設計方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、安裝、送電或營運前，應與合格專業人士核實現行孟加拉國BSTI、BPDB、BERC、配電公用事業、消防、建築、稅務及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Bangladesh, do not assume that China GB/T 18487 or GB/T 20234 evidence directly closes the Bangladesh file. The practical gaps are confirming whether BSTI has an applicable Bangladesh Standard or compulsory import / certification route for the exact charger, mapping safety evidence to IEC 61851 where requested, resolving GB/T 20234 connector incompatibility against IEC 62196 project expectations, and obtaining BPDB or distribution-utility review for grid connection, metering, protection, power quality, and site energisation. Bangladesh and China both use 50 Hz, but the exact voltage, earthing, utility protection settings, and site approval still need local validation.
answer_first.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备出口孟加拉国时，不应假定中国GB/T 18487或GB/T 20234证据可直接覆盖孟加拉国文件。实际差距包括：确认BSTI是否对具体充电设备适用孟加拉国标准或强制进口/认证路径；在项目要求时将安全证据映射至IEC 61851；解决GB/T 20234接口与IEC 62196项目预期之间的不兼容；并取得BPDB或配电公用事业对并网、计量、保护、电能质量和现场送电的审查。孟加拉国和中国均采用50 Hz，但具体电压、接地、公用事业保护设定和现场批准仍需本地验证。
answer_first.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備出口孟加拉國時，不應假定中國GB/T 18487或GB/T 20234證據可直接覆蓋孟加拉國文件。實際差距包括：確認BSTI是否對具體充電設備適用孟加拉國標準或強制進口／認證路徑；在專案要求時將安全證據映射至IEC 61851；解決GB/T 20234接口與IEC 62196專案預期之間的不相容；並取得BPDB或配電公用事業對併網、計量、保護、電能品質和現場送電的審查。孟加拉國和中國均採用50 Hz，但具體電壓、接地、公用事業保護設定和現場批准仍需本地驗證。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, legal source, ministry, customs, tax, fire/building authority, or primary standards catalogue preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
